mapper.select: select id, month_count, unit from lease_term where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select lease_term_id from room_lease_term where is_deleted = 0 and room_id = #{id})
select id, month_count, unit from lease_term where id = #{id}
select id, month_count, unit from lease_term where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select lease_term_id from room_lease_term where is_deleted = 0 and room_id = #{id})
